title: Tarkus Adventure
description: An adventure pack with lots to do. Including new world generation, dungeons, and bosses.
body: Prepare to explore and adventure with this modpack. It includes new food, biomes, dungeons, and survival mechanics to make exploring a new experience. With this pack you'll need to do some planning and preparation before going on a new adventure. Once you start you'll be able to gather all kinds of new loot and fight new enemies. These features combine to make exploring a new experience for you to try.
